videos.title: Boros Modify Just Wanted an Origin Story
videos.description:
Boros Modified is a fun little aggro variant that is in Standard thanks to a cheap little Saga about a Spider...

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish
